breaches.label: FBYY
breaches.source: 1,594 sh short · Binding: median vol (30% × 800 60d med = 240 sh cap) (664% of cap) · Other: shares-out (35% × 30,001 out = 10,500 sh cap) (15% of cap)
breaches.action: Cut ~1,402 sh on FBYY to reach warn band (1,354 sh over median vol (30% × 800 60d med = 240 sh cap)).

breaches.label: HMYY

breaches.action: Cut ~338 sh on HMYY to reach warn band (176 sh over median vol (30% × 2,700 60d med = 810 sh cap)).

breaches.label: MAAY

breaches.action: Cut ~5,679 sh on MAAY to reach warn band (5,175 sh over median vol (30% × 8,400 60d med = 2,520 sh cap)).

indices.description: T+0: instantaneous portfolio β×ΔSPX. 1M–12M: horizon-scaled equity shock (rms) + LETF decay/borrow. 12M-terminal row uses full labeled ΔSPX. Historical rows integrate piecewise SPX paths.

vix_decay_matrix.description: Expected vol-driven decay over the next 12 months at SPX 0%, with forecast vol adjusted by vol elasticity (v3 log-log), variance decomposition, and optional spike-revert path integral. Borrow excluded (assumed unchanged across scenarios).
